description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. One of the columns is headed "dār al-murabbaʿa." There are entries for construction expenses (e.g., rubbish collection (ramy turāb)), many for a certain Abū Sahl, and one for "the Jew" (al-Yahūdī).
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
